Prominent leaders from TMC and BJP are in contention.

description: Candace Owens has sparked online speculation after canceling her show again, with a viral post questioning her whereabouts during the White House Correspondents Dinner incident and suggesting a possible link to Cole Allen. No verified evidence supports these claims, but her silence has fueled debate, highlighting how quickly unconfirmed narratives can spread across social media.

title: What global banks said about Anthropic's Mythos that company ‘refused’ to release publicly
description: Anthropic's powerful AI model, Claude Mythos, capable of finding software vulnerabilities, has prompted a global financial sector scramble. Banks, regulators, and central bankers are urgently assessing risks and accelerating cybersecurity investments. Project Glasswing offers controlled access for defensive security work, highlighting the evolving threat landscape.
